title: Saudi Arabian Rice Pudding
description: A traditional Saudi dessert made with rice, sweetened with sugar and flavored with citrus.
instructions: Rinse the rice in a fine mesh strainer until the water runs clear.
Combine the rice and water in a medium saucepan and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for 18 minutes.
In a separate saucepan, combine the sugar, honey, cardamom powder, and salt.
Heat over medium heat, stirring constantly, until the sugar dissolves.
Add the sugar mixture to the cooked rice and stir to combine.
Return the saucepan to low heat and simmer for an additional 5 minutes.
